====Pokémon====
=====Controlled=====
While Colress has not been shown to own {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in [[Pokémon Generations]], he controlled the following Pokémon:
{{TrainerPoké

|pkmn=Kyurem
|type1=Dragon

|epname=The Frozen World
